channel.title: Developer-Experience on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Developer-Experience on Junho Lee

item.title: Better Terminal UX for LLM Code and Architecture Outputs
item.description: Codexplain is a local-first UX layer that formats messy LLM outputs, tables, and architecture diagrams without altering raw source code or JSON payloads.

item.title: Cutting Through Claude Code Setup Confusion with Plugin Advisor
item.description: If you have ever stalled in front of the plugin list when first setting up Claude Code, Plugin Advisor narrows that entrance. Preset Packs and pre-flight checklists catch runtime errors before they happen.
